steps.stdout: MISS page 1 — insert at MRU; cache is now [1].
MISS page 2 — free capacity remains, so insert at MRU.
MISS page 3 — insert at MRU; page 1 is now least recent.
MISS page 4 — fill the final free cache slot.
HIT page 1 — move it from LRU to MRU without evicting anything.
MISS page 5 — cache is full, so remove LRU page 2 before inserting 5 at MRU.
MISS page 2 — it was evicted earlier. Remove current LRU page 3, then insert 2.
MISS page 6 — evict page 4 because it has gone longest without an access.
MISS page 3 — evict page 1, the current LRU entry, then promote 3 to MRU.
MISS page 4 — evict page 5 and insert 4 at MRU; the final order is [4, 3, 6, 2].
